meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.20 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] 分数 (fraction) is a forward-reference emphasis-page treatment (https://www.aozora.gr.jp/annotation/etc.html), particle は, single target, inline. Per §7.5 it consumes the immediately preceding fullwidth target literal １／４ and yields an emphasis node; §8 reference rendering splits the target on the slash into …⁄… joined by the fraction slash U+2044. Offsets computed from the §4 byte model (each fullwidth char = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor. The corpus attests both ASCII '/' and fullwidth '／' slashes; this vector exercises the fullwidth slash in a Reclaimed (preceding-literal) shape.
